notes: Examine.com comprehensive evidence summary on fish oil/omega-3; covers EPA/DHA mechanisms, triglyceride reduction, brain health, and cardiovascular evidence with nuance on supplemental vs dietary sources
Rizos et al. 2012 JAMA meta-analysis (n=68680): omega-3 supplementation not associated with lower CV mortality in RCTs; supports nuanced cardiovascular section in resource body
Crupi et al. 2013 Curr Med Chem: n-3 fatty acids and neurogenesis/neuroplasticity; relevant to brain health section (DHA and cognitive function); previously mislabeled as Rizos JAMA — corrected

McBurney et al. 2021 AJCN — Framingham Offspring Cohort (2240 participants, 11yr follow-up); high omega-3 index associated with ~5 year longer life expectancy; low omega-3 index as strong a predictor of early death as smoking

Bischoff-Ferrari et al. 2025 Nature Aging — DO-HEALTH trial RCT (777 participants, 3yr); 1g/day omega-3 slowed 3 of 4 epigenetic aging clocks by ~3 months; additive benefit when combined with vitamin D and exercise
